Lessons > 1. Introduction

Welcome to the course!

We will be using regularly scheduled class time for live discussions of content, videos, programming activities, and / or readings that have been posted for the day.

  • Please review the slides and videos (if applicable) before class
  • Please attend the live lectures, program with all of us, and ask questions
  • All live lectures will be recorded
